# vendomat — shared external constraints (M4).
#
# The unified pin floor the personal *man-family libs reference for their common external deps.
# One documented place per external dependency (plan issue #6): a consuming repo can point uv at
# this file (`uv pip install -c .../vendor/constraints.txt`) so every consumer resolves the same
# floor the knowledge skills were written against.
#
# Each line here should stay in lockstep with the `pin` of the matching `vendor/libs/<lib>/meta.toml`
# entry: the SKILL.md was written against that version, and `vendomat doctor` flags a skill stale
# (review-on-bump) when a consumer's resolved version diverges from it.

typer==0.12.5
